caption: A man with short, grey-tinged brown hair and a light beard is recording in a studio. He is wearing large black over-ear headphones and a dark grey or black long-sleeved garment. He is positioned behind a professional silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm, which is equipped with a pop filter. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels with a vertical ribbed texture. In the initial sequence, the man has his eyes closed or cast downward with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he opens his eyes and shifts his gaze upward and to his right, maintaining a thoughtful or expectant expression. His posture remains relatively still, and the camera angle remains fixed on him throughout the transition. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
